case_title: ZAKY AARYA VS. YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2016 - CONTINUED TO OCT-20-2016 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 BY COURT. THIS CASE IS VOLUNTARILY CONTINUED TO 10/20/16. RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT A--RETURNED TO ZAKY AARYA IN COURT AFTER THE HEARING. NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDING. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANA KRUZE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-525)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER DISMISSING SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL MAILED TO CLEVELAND POLITE ON 10/21/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CLEVELAND POLITE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-18-2016 AT 3:30 PM.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AARYA, ZAKY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,130.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST CLEVELAND POLITE IS DISMISSESD WITH PREJUDICE. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-21-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, October 20, 2016.
No Appearances by Appellant Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc. and Cleveland Polite.
No Appearances by Respondent Zaky Aarya.

Appeal dismissed--Case Settled. "The Judgment of Small Claims Court dated 7/19/16 for $10,130.00 is voided, as the Court finds there is a Bankruptcy Stay. The matter is Dismissed with Prejudice. Release submitted to Court on 10/18/16. This case is remanded back to Small Claims Court", per Pro Tem Judge Diana Kruze. No Appearances by Appellant and Respondent. Judge Pro Tem: Diana Kruze. Clerk: P. Natt. Not Reported. (D-525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-15-2016 Continued To Oct-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, September 15,2016:

Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc., Appellant/Defendant was present.
Michelle M. Gildea, Attorney for Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc., Appellant/Defendant.
Michelle M. Gildea, Law offices of Borton/Petrini LLP. (415-677-0730)

Zaky Aarya, Respondent/Plaintiff, Appears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on calendar as assigned by Department 206 for trial de novo.

Appellants/Defendants Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc., Attorney Michelle M. Gildea was sworn in and testifies on her clients behalf.

Respondent/Plaintiff Zaky Aarya, testifies on his own behalf.

Exhibit No. A was returned to the Respondent/Plaintiff Zaky Aarya, in court after the hearing.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter was continued to October 20, 2016 at 9:00am in D-525. A Notice of Stay of Proceeding filed by Appellant/Defendant Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc.

Judge Pro Tem: Diana Kruze. Clerk: P. Natt. matter not reported (D525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-19-2016 Judgment Entered
